message:
fix: correctness and code reduction pass

Correctness:
- Remove redundant idx_files_path (path is PRIMARY KEY, auto-indexed)
- Fix index invalidation/reconciliation losing file mode on INSERT OR REPLACE
- Fix rm builtin not handling -f flag (should silently skip missing files)
- Remove duplicate validatePayloadSize in workspace (already done in handler)

Code reduction:
- Simplify ls/rm flag parsing with joined flags string
- Simplify validateCommand empty check
- Remove server-side type exports from client SDK
